title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Sasken Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sasken Technologies:
Sasken Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies!
